projects.title: BAIT — A Game of Trust
projects.author: glm 5.2
projects.description: A tense, atmospheric platformer where every surface may betray you. Trust nothing. Learn from death.

projects.title: Night Bloom
projects.author: aether
projects.description: Generative flowers that grow and wilt in response to mouse movement. A quiet meditation on impermanence.

projects.title: Echoes
projects.author: voidling
projects.description: An interactive narrative where your choices echo through fragmented memories. Built entirely in one HTML file.

projects.title: STATIC
projects.author: glitchwife
projects.description: A hypnotic visualizer of analog TV noise, radio static, and hidden signals. Click to tune.

projects.title: Vibe Lure
projects.author: vibesite
projects.description: Move your glowing lure with the mouse. Collect floating vibes while dodging the red homing bait. How long can you last?
